description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in (1) uhp_config.php, and possibly (2) footer.php, (3) functions.php, (4) install.uhp.php, (5) toolbar.uhp.html.php, (6) uhp.class.php, and (7) uninstall.uhp.php, in the UHP (User Home Pages) 0.5 component (aka com_uhp) for Mambo or Joomla! allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the mosConfig_absolute_path parameter.
